    descriptionLieutenant Kreiger: “Sorry, I fell asleep, there’s rarely any time to get some rest… sigh... Perhaps you can help me to deal with one of my problems now? The planet Erath is besieged by slavers, their space station is generating a shield that’s blocking access to the planet. Go there clear out 12 slaver ships.”

    completeDescriptionLieutenant Kreiger: “Thank you! Take out that station and land on the planet and check out what’s going on with the colony While you’re down there feel free to scavenge for minerals.”
